summary: Phase 1 Payment Mediation System testing completed. All 11 features verified working. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components and payment flows working correctly.

issues: Minor React warning: 'tr cannot be a child of span' - cosmetic hydration warning, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Payment Mediation System implemented correctly with full CRUD operations
Razorpay integration in test mode with mock order_id generation
seed_data_creation: Created test payments during testing - all in 'released' status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Payment Mediation System fully verified. Key endpoints: /api/payments/create-order, /api/payments/verify, /api/payments/{id}/simulate-payment (admin test mode), /api/payments/{id}/release (admin only), /api/payments/stats/summary. Frontend: Admin Payments page at /admin/payments shows stats and payment table. RM Lead Detail shows Advance Payment section for booking_confirmed leads with deal value.

admin_payments_page.stats_cards: PASS - Total Collected, BMV Commission, Pending Release, Released to Venues all displaying correctly
admin_payments_page.payments_table: PASS - Shows Payment ID, Customer, Advance Amount, BMV Commission, Net to Venue, Status, Date, Actions columns
admin_payments_page.status_filter: PASS - Dropdown with All Statuses, Awaiting Payment, Advance Paid, Released, Failed options
admin_payments_page.simulate_payment_btn: PASS - Visible for awaiting_advance payments, admin only
admin_payments_page.release_payment_btn: PASS - Visible for advance_paid payments, admin only
admin_payments_page.release_dialog: PASS - Shows customer, amount breakdown, notes field, warning, confirm button

sidebar_navigation.payments_link: PASS - Visible in admin sidebar with CreditCard icon

rm_lead_detail_payment_section.advance_payment_section: PASS - Shows when lead is booking_confirmed with deal value
rm_lead_detail_payment_section.advance_amount_input: PASS - Input field with suggested 10-30% range
rm_lead_detail_payment_section.commission_preview: PASS - Shows 10% BMV Commission and Net to Venue calculation
rm_lead_detail_payment_section.generate_payment_link_btn: PASS - Creates payment order and generates link
rm_lead_detail_payment_section.payment_link_display: PASS - Shows link with Copy button after generation
rm_lead_detail_payment_section.payment_status_badges: PASS - Awaiting Payment (amber), Advance Paid (green), Released (blue)

backend_apis.create_order: PASS - /api/payments/create-order creates payment with mock Razorpay order
backend_apis.simulate_payment: PASS - /api/payments/{id}/simulate-payment simulates payment in test mode

mocked_apis.razorpay_order_creation: MOCKED - Test mode generates mock order_id like order_xxx
mocked_apis.razorpay_payment_verification: MOCKED - Test mode skips signature verification
